title: Numerical Linear Algebra and Optimization
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving large constrained computational models. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible numerical linear optimization computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate direct iterative solvers in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive matrix conditioning in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute gradient methods in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
